On the map view

This page ranks provinces and commercial sales regions using the district potential data already in the workbook — it does not render a literal Pakistan choropleth map. That needs verified district/province boundary shapes (GeoJSON), which aren't part of this dataset; fabricating approximate boundaries would risk showing executives a visually authoritative but geometrically wrong map. If you can point to a boundary file, this page is the natural place to wire it in.

Demand Forecast
Seasonal-index × trend model, back-tested against actual months on record
Product:
Horizon: Scenario: Low/High = trend growth ∓2 percentage points
Urea Demand ForecastActual (solid) vs Base/Best/Worst scenario (dashed), shaded confidence band
Forecast Detail TableBase/Best/Worst by month
Model basis

Each month's forecast = (last complete year's total × 3-year CAGR, compounded to the forecast year) × that month's historical seasonal index. The confidence band is not a guess: it's the model's own back-tested error against the actual months already on record for the current year, applied forward as ±1 standard deviation for Best/Worst. This is a transparent statistical projection, not a machine-learning forecast.

Data Coverage
Every dataset in this platform, its source, granularity, and the exact period it covers — so an empty chart region is never a mystery
Dataset Matrix
Reading this page

Coverage is computed live from the embedded data itself, not typed by hand — if a dataset is extended, this page updates on refresh. Datasets marked "snapshot" are a single point-in-time baseline, not a time series.

CEO Decision Engine
Every recommendation below is computed live by cross-referencing the platform's datasets — nothing is pre-written
Action BoardRanked by impact × urgency · click a row for evidence, risk-if-ignored and expected effect
Horizon:
What NOT To DoEqually computed — restraint with reasons
Early WarningsSignals forming before they become problems
Live Cause → Effect ChainThe dominant transmission mechanism running through the business right now, every node a live number
Learned PatternsMined from this market's own history — each with its sample size, never asserted beyond the data
Strategic PlaybooksEach activates automatically when live conditions match its trigger
Engine Journal — Did Previous Calls Verify?Directional calls from your last session, checked against where the data stands now
What this engine can and cannot see

Strategy Room
Not another chart page — the platform's live signals, ranked by impact and urgency, distilled into a direction
Priority MatrixEvery live signal the platform is tracking, scored by business impact (→) and urgency (↑) · top-right demands attention first
Recommended DirectionThe top-priority signals, each with its computed rationale and suggested move
